creator: yonas.yanfa@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #2)

> There is no reason as to why sysutils/catsit should be deprecated.

Go to https://git.causal.agency/catsit/about and search for "deprecated". It's at the top of the page: (deprecated) process supervisor


> Then, there is mention of some kitd. Where is that kitd in the ports tree that you mentioned?

kitd doesn't exist in the ports tree yet. I recommend someone - eg. the catsit maintainer - create a kitd port. I don't have time to maintain ports anymore.
